title: Understanding CloudDash Invoices
content: CloudDash invoices include the subscription plan, billing period, workspace identifier, taxes when applicable, and any prorated adjustments from plan changes. Usage-based line items may appear for contracted Enterprise customers. Billing Admins can download invoices from Settings > Billing > Invoices. If a customer disputes a line item, collect the invoice number, billing period, workspace ID, and the specific line item before deciding whether to resolve through policy guidance or escalate.
